title: Dysophylla myosuroides
taxonomy: Dysophylla myosuroides is classified within the family Lamiaceae. This classification places Dysophylla myosuroides among other plants commonly known as mint family or deadnettle family. Dysophylla myosuroides is further classified within the genus Dysophylla, which is a monotypic genus. The classification of Dysophylla myosuroides is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics. Dysophylla myosuroides is native to Australia and New Guinea.

parts:
